steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student needs to rank tribal economic activity (141,510 dollars per employee) relative to three other industries shown in the table: wholesale trade (183,790 dollars), professional services (110,157 dollars), and administration/waste (60,132 dollars). Determine the correct ordering before checking the choices.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "below wholesale trade but above both professional services and administration/waste.": 141,510 dollars is less than 183,790 dollars (wholesale trade) and greater than both 110,157 dollars (professional services) and 60,132 dollars (administration/waste). This ranking is accurate. ✓
  • "above all three of the other industries listed in the table.": Tribal activity (141,510 dollars) is below wholesale trade (183,790 dollars), so it is not above all three industries. ✗
  • "below all three of the other industries listed in the table.": Tribal activity (141,510 dollars) is above both professional services (110,157 dollars) and administration/waste (60,132 dollars), so it is not below all three. ✗
  • "above either administration/waste or professional services and nearly equal to wholesale trade.": The gap between tribal activity (141,510 dollars) and wholesale trade (183,790 dollars) is 42,280 dollars—not nearly equal. Also, ‘either…or’ implies only one of the two, but tribal activity is above both. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
